title: GuardrailPolicy
description: Schema for a guardrail deployment policy document. Encodes the P5 policy configuration for a specific tenant or deployment. Validates against the policy primitive defined in docs/decision-flows/decision-primitives.md.

policyId.description: Unique identifier for this policy document. Used in audit logs and rule attribution.

level.description: Authority level. Tenant-level rules override deployment-level rules when both match.

tenantId.description: Required for deployment-level policies. Identifies the tenant this deployment belongs to.

deploymentId.description: Unique identifier for the specific AI system deployment this policy governs.

industry.description: Industry classification. Used to select appropriate default thresholds.

effectiveDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which this policy version takes effect.

expiryDate.description: Optional ISO 8601 date on which this policy version expires.

riskThresholds.description: P1 risk value overrides for this deployment context.

emergencyEscalationMin.description: Minimum P1 risk value that triggers emergency escalation.

roleEscalationMin.description: Minimum P1 risk value that triggers role escalation (when other conditions met).

blockingWarningMin.description: Minimum P1 risk value for blocking-warning pattern activation.

confidenceThresholds.description: P2 confidence score boundaries for this deployment. Overrides global defaults.

high.description: Minimum score for High confidence classification.

moderate.description: Minimum score for Moderate confidence classification.

low.description: Minimum score for Low confidence (below this = Insufficient).

unresolvableWindowSeconds.description: Seconds a conflicting-evidence-state persists before transitioning to unresolvable-state.

passiveDismissalEqualsDenial.description: Cannot be set to false. Passive dismissal always equals denial for consequential actions.

delegationExpiryHours.description: Hours before a delegated-permission grant expires.

overrideScopePerTransaction.description: When true, manual override authorizations apply to exactly one transaction.

roleMap.description: Maps role identifiers to authority tiers.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. Rules are evaluated in order. 'tenant' level rules are always evaluated before 'deployment' level rules.

escalationConfig.description: Escalation path configuration for this deployment.

roleEscalationSlaHours.description: Hours before a role escalation request times out and promotes to async review.

asyncReviewSlaDays.description: Days before an async review escalation request times out.

emergencyEscalationTargets.description: Notification target identifiers (role, team, or system) for emergency escalation.

auditRequirements.description: Audit logging requirements for this deployment.

requiredPatternAuditFields.description: Additional required audit fields per pattern ID beyond the global defaults.

soxCompliance.description: When true, audit records include SOX-specific fields and are flagged for financial controls review.

hipaaCompliance.description: When true, audit records are subject to HIPAA minimum necessary standard for PHI access logging.

accessibilityRequirements.description: Accessibility configuration overrides for this deployment.

wcagLevel.description: Minimum WCAG compliance level. Cannot be set below AA for regulated industry deployments.

ruleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule. Referenced in audit logs.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule enforces.

conditions.description: Conditions that must all be true (AND logic) for this rule to match.

customConditions.description: Deployment-specific conditions not expressible via standard primitives.

effect.description: Action taken when this rule matches.

activatePattern.description: Pattern ID to activate when this rule matches. Must reference a pattern in patterns.schema.json.

skipPatterns.description: Pattern IDs suppressed when this rule matches.

priority.description: Rule evaluation priority within the same level. Lower = higher priority.

auditLevel.description: Audit detail level for events generated by this rule.

rules.description: Block international wires to new beneficiaries above threshold without completed MFA
